Built for real privacy

Why ZCash Wallet

Everything private.
Nothing compromised.

Shielded by Default

Every transaction is protected using zk-SNARKs — the gold standard in on-chain privacy. Sender, receiver, and amount stay encrypted on-chain.

Non-Custodial

Your keys, your ZEC. Private keys never leave your device. No accounts, no servers, no third party standing between you and your funds.

20+ Languages

Privacy is a universal right. ZCash Wallet is fully localized in more than 20 languages so everyone can transact privately, regardless of region.
